name: ApplicationVersion
summary: Provides information about the version of the currently running API and Runtime

properties.name: ApiMajor
properties.summary: Major version number for the Navisworks API. Changes when a non-backwards compatible change is made to a stable version of the API. Always less than or equal to RuntimeMajor.

properties.name: ApiMinor
properties.summary: Minor version number for the Navisworks API. Changes when there is a behavioral or minor change to a stable version of the API that may have an impact on backwards compatibility. Always less than or equal to RuntimeMinor.

properties.name: Build
properties.summary: Build number for Api and Runtime. Changes on every build (and hence every release).

properties.name: IsApiStable
properties.summary: Is this version of the API stable ? If false, breaking changes may be made at any time and client code must be recompiled for every build. Api will be unstable for alpha and early beta releases.

properties.name: IsRuntimeBeta
properties.summary: Is this an alpha or beta version of the runtime ?

properties.name: Runtime
properties.summary: Identifies the Navisworks runtime that is providing this implementation of the API. Will typically be an installed Navisworks product.

properties.name: RuntimeLanguage
properties.summary: Gets the language code corresponding to the one Navisworks is using.

properties.name: RuntimeMajor
properties.summary: Major version number for the current Navisworks Runtime. This changes with every major (annual) release of Navisworks products.

properties.name: RuntimeMinor
properties.summary: Minor version number for the current Navisworks Runtime. This changes with every minor (service pack or subscription release) update of Navisworks products.

properties.name: RuntimeProductName
properties.summary: The complete product name for the Navisworks runtime that is providing this implementation of the API.
